examples.name: Basic Meraki service output with four processes
examples.input:
Meraki Process Summary:
----------------------------------------------
Meraki Mgrd                    : Running
Meraki Tunnel Client           : Running
IOS Console Service            : Running
Nextunnel Packet Capture       : Not Running

examples.name: Live device output
examples.input:
Meraki Process Summary:
----------------------------------------------
Meraki Mgrd                    : Not Running
Meraki Tunnel Client           : Not Running
IOS Console Service            : Not Running

examples.name: Meraki service output with five processes including Meraki Ncmd
examples.input:
Meraki Process Summary:
----------------------------------------------
Meraki Mgrd                    : Running
Meraki Tunnel Client           : Running
IOS Console Service            : Running
Nextunnel Packet Capture       : Not Running
Meraki Ncmd                    : Running
